description: Review finding suppressions — patterns the team has explicitly marked as acceptable

suppressions.reason: These are intentional documentation examples, not production code
Placeholder credentials in .env.example templates are acceptable when they are clearly fake and no real secrets are committed.

usage_notes: Add entries here when the AI review flags something your team considers acceptable.
Use file_glob patterns to scope suppressions to specific files or directories.
Set 'expires' to an ISO date string to auto-expire temporary suppressions.
Set 'active' to false to disable without deleting (preserves history).
The review crew checks this file before reporting findings — suppressed items are filtered out.
This file is version-controlled: the team's review preferences are part of the project history.
